{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Female NYSC Front Desk Officer / Receptionist",
  "description": "Nairametricsis a leading business and financial media platform providing data-driven insights on the Nigerian economy, capital markets, business, and personal finance.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Female&nbsp;NYSC Front Desk Officer / Receptionist

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview


	We are looking for a smart, courteous, and well-organized Female NYSC Corps Member seeking a Primary Place of Assignment (PPA)to serve as a Front Desk Officer/Receptionist.
	In this role, you will be the first point of contact for visitors and callers, while gaining hands-on experience in office administration and corporate communication within a professional media environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Welcome and attend to visitors in a professional manner
	Answer, screen, and route phone calls and inquiries
	Manage incoming and outgoing correspondence
	Maintain a clean and organized reception area
	Keep records of visitors and handle basic access control
	Provide administrative support to the team as required
	Liaise with internal staff to ensure smooth front office operations


Requirements


	Current Female NYSC Corps Member seeking a Primary Place of Assignment (PPA)
	Mustresideon the Island (Lekki, Ajah, VI, Ikoyi, etc.)
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Professional, friendly, and well-presented
	Basic computer skills (Microsoft Word, Excel, email)
	Strong organizational skills and attention to detail
	Willingness to learn and take initiative.


What You&rsquo;ll Gain:


	Hands-on work experience in a professional organization
	Exposure to administrative processes and corporate communication
	Opportunity to build workplace and customer service skills.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hello.hr@nairametrics.com&nbsp;using&nbsp;&quot;NYSC Front Desk Officer&quot; as the subject of the mail.

Note


	FEMALE NYSC Corps Members Only (Seeking PPA)
	Applicants must reside on the Island (Lekki, Ajah, Victoria Island, Ikoyi, etc.)
",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-27",

Female NYSC Front Desk Officer / Receptionist Job at Nairametrics




        
    

        
        Nairametricsis a leading business and financial media platform providing data-driven insights on the Nigerian economy, capital markets, business, and personal finance.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Female NYSC Front Desk Officer / Receptionist

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a smart, courteous, and well-organized Female NYSC Corps Member seeking a Primary Place of Assignment (PPA)to serve as a Front Desk Officer/Receptionist.
	In this role, you will be the first point of contact for visitors and callers, while gaining hands-on experience in office administration and corporate communication within a professional media environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Welcome and attend to visitors in a professional manner
	Answer, screen, and route phone calls and inquiries
	Manage incoming and outgoing correspondence
	Maintain a clean and organized reception area
	Keep records of visitors and handle basic access control
	Provide administrative support to the team as required
	Liaise with internal staff to ensure smooth front office operations


Requirements


	Current Female NYSC Corps Member seeking a Primary Place of Assignment (PPA)
	Mustresideon the Island (Lekki, Ajah, VI, Ikoyi, etc.)
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Professional, friendly, and well-presented
	Basic computer skills (Microsoft Word, Excel, email)
	Strong organizational skills and attention to detail
	Willingness to learn and take initiative.


What You’ll Gain:


	Hands-on work experience in a professional organization
	Exposure to administrative processes and corporate communication
	Opportunity to build workplace and customer service skills.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "NYSC Front Desk Officer" as the subject of the mail.

Note


	FEMALE NYSC Corps Members Only (Seeking PPA)
	Applicants must reside on the Island (Lekki, Ajah, Victoria Island, Ikoyi, etc.)
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Electrical Engineer",
  "description": "Luxsit Integration Limited is a smart home solution company located in the heart of Lagos.Our main focus is to bring people and technology together. We handle all aspects of your technology project including design, scheduling, project management, installation, and service and support. We are a customer service-oriented company and strive for complete customer satisfaction. With our experienced and trained dedicated team of tech experts, bringing your dreams to reality. At Luxsit integration &ndash; whether the project is new construction or retrofit, we integrate seamlessly with all involved to deliver custom, lifestyle inspired solutions across the spectrum of automation, audio/video, cinema rooms, lighting, climate, and security.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Electrical Engineer
Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Designing, maintaining, implementing, or improving electrical instruments, facilities, components, equipment products, or systems for industrial, commercial, or domestic purposes.
	Performing a wide range of engineering tasks by operating computer-assisted design or engineering software and equipment.
	Conferring with customers, engineers, and others to discuss existing or potential engineering products or projects.
	Ensuring that installation and operations conform to standards and customer requirements by preparing electrical systems specifications, technical drawings, or topographical maps.
	Establishing construction, manufacturing, or installation standards or specifications by performing a wide range of detailed calculations.
	Ensuring compliance with specifications, codes, or customer requirements by directing or coordinating installation, manufacturing, construction, maintenance, documentation, support, or testing activities.
	Writing reports and compiling data regarding existing and potential electrical engineering projects and studies.
	Preparing specifications for purchases of electrical equipment and materials.
	Supervising or training project team members.
	Estimating material, labor, or construction costs for budget preparation.
	Maintaining electrical equipment.
	Working with a variety of technicians.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a B.Sc Degree with 2 - 3 years of work experience.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;lillian.owoseni@luxsitintegration.com&nbsp;or&nbsp;hr@luxsitintegration.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Luxsit Integration"
    
  },

    "@type": "Place",

      "@type": "PostalAddress",

Electrical Engineer Job at Luxsit Integration Limited




        
    

        
        Luxsit Integration Limited is a smart home solution company located in the heart of Lagos.Our main focus is to bring people and technology together. We handle all aspects of your technology project including design, scheduling, project management, installation, and service and support. We are a customer service-oriented company and strive for complete customer satisfaction. With our experienced and trained dedicated team of tech experts, bringing your dreams to reality. At Luxsit integration – whether the project is new construction or retrofit, we integrate seamlessly with all involved to deliver custom, lifestyle inspired solutions across the spectrum of automation, audio/video, cinema rooms, lighting, climate, and security.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Electrical Engineer
Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Designing, maintaining, implementing, or improving electrical instruments, facilities, components, equipment products, or systems for industrial, commercial, or domestic purposes.
	Performing a wide range of engineering tasks by operating computer-assisted design or engineering software and equipment.
	Conferring with customers, engineers, and others to discuss existing or potential engineering products or projects.
	Ensuring that installation and operations conform to standards and customer requirements by preparing electrical systems specifications, technical drawings, or topographical maps.
	Establishing construction, manufacturing, or installation standards or specifications by performing a wide range of detailed calculations.
	Ensuring compliance with specifications, codes, or customer requirements by directing or coordinating installation, manufacturing, construction, maintenance, documentation, support, or testing activities.
	Writing reports and compiling data regarding existing and potential electrical engineering projects and studies.
	Preparing specifications for purchases of electrical equipment and materials.
	Supervising or training project team members.
	Estimating material, labor, or construction costs for budget preparation.
	Maintaining electrical equipment.
	Working with a variety of technicians.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a B.Sc Degree with 2 - 3 years of work experience.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] or [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Client Relations Officer",
  "description": "Pem Security Guard Network Limited is a fully licensed &amp; insured security company with years of experience in the industry with a mission to provide top-notch security services to our clients, such that their expectation are met and exceeded, while being spotless &amp; professional at it.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Client Relations Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Umuahia, Abia
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a dedicated and proactive Client Relation Officer to join our dynamic team in the Security and Investigations industry.
	This role is crucial in building and maintaining strong, long-lasting relationships with our clients by understanding their needs and ensuring their satisfaction with our services.
	The ideal candidate will serve as the main point of contact between clients and our company, facilitating communication and fostering trust.
	You will be responsible for managing client inquiries, resolving issues promptly, and providing detailed information on our security and investigation solutions.
	This position requires excellent interpersonal skills, a keen attention to detail, and the ability to work collaboratively with different departments to ensure that client expectations are consistently met or exceeded.
	As a Client Relation Officer, you will also contribute valuable feedback to help improve our service offerings and support business growth.
	If you are passionate about client service and interested in a role that combines customer relationship management with the fast-paced environment of security and investigations, we encourage you to apply and become part of our committed team.


Responsibilities


	Act as the primary point of contact for clients, addressing their inquiries and concerns promptly and professionally.
	Develop and maintain strong relationships with new and existing clients to ensure high levels of client satisfaction.
	Coordinate with internal teams such as security operations and investigation units to fulfill client requirements effectively.
	Provide accurate and detailed information about our security and investigation services to clients.
	Assist in preparing client proposals, presentations, and reports to support business development efforts.
	Monitor client accounts and follow up to ensure issues are resolved and services meet client expectations.
	Gather client feedback to identify areas for service improvement and report insights to management.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or HND in Business Administration, Security Management, or related field preferred.
	Proven experience in client relations, customer service, or account management, ideally within the security or investigations sector.
	Exceptional communication and interpersonal skills with the ability to build rapport quickly.
	Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to manage conflicts constructively.
	Ability to handle multiple clients and projects simultaneously while maintaining attention to detail.
	Proficiency in using CRM software and Microsoft Office suite.
	High level of discretion and professionalism when dealing with sensitive client information.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their Resume to:&nbsp;careers@pemsecurityservices.com&nbsp;using the Job Position and Location as the subject of the mail.",

Client Relations Officer Job at Pem Security Guard Network Limited




        
    

        
        Pem Security Guard Network Limited is a fully licensed & insured security company with years of experience in the industry with a mission to provide top-notch security services to our clients, such that their expectation are met and exceeded, while being spotless & professional at it.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Client Relations Officer

Job Location: Umuahia, Abia
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a dedicated and proactive Client Relation Officer to join our dynamic team in the Security and Investigations industry.
	This role is crucial in building and maintaining strong, long-lasting relationships with our clients by understanding their needs and ensuring their satisfaction with our services.
	The ideal candidate will serve as the main point of contact between clients and our company, facilitating communication and fostering trust.
	You will be responsible for managing client inquiries, resolving issues promptly, and providing detailed information on our security and investigation solutions.
	This position requires excellent interpersonal skills, a keen attention to detail, and the ability to work collaboratively with different departments to ensure that client expectations are consistently met or exceeded.
	As a Client Relation Officer, you will also contribute valuable feedback to help improve our service offerings and support business growth.
	If you are passionate about client service and interested in a role that combines customer relationship management with the fast-paced environment of security and investigations, we encourage you to apply and become part of our committed team.


Responsibilities


	Act as the primary point of contact for clients, addressing their inquiries and concerns promptly and professionally.
	Develop and maintain strong relationships with new and existing clients to ensure high levels of client satisfaction.
	Coordinate with internal teams such as security operations and investigation units to fulfill client requirements effectively.
	Provide accurate and detailed information about our security and investigation services to clients.
	Assist in preparing client proposals, presentations, and reports to support business development efforts.
	Monitor client accounts and follow up to ensure issues are resolved and services meet client expectations.
	Gather client feedback to identify areas for service improvement and report insights to management.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree or HND in Business Administration, Security Management, or related field preferred.
	Proven experience in client relations, customer service, or account management, ideally within the security or investigations sector.
	Exceptional communication and interpersonal skills with the ability to build rapport quickly.
	Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to manage conflicts constructively.
	Ability to handle multiple clients and projects simultaneously while maintaining attention to detail.
	Proficiency in using CRM software and Microsoft Office suite.
	High level of discretion and professionalism when dealing with sensitive client information.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their Resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position and Location as the subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Service Delivery Manager",
  "description": "Cobranet Limited; a reputable organization incorporated in 2003 and provides internet solutions. Our footprint and range of products have grown immensely since incorporation and we are proud to provide every segment of society with a reliable link to the digital universe.

Our entire network topology is rugged, dynamic and fully redundant with negligible downtimes: content showing extremely high availability exceeding 99.5%. Our promise is to continue providing innovative solutions at the best feature-to-price and service-to-price ratio.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Service Delivery Manager
Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	A Service Delivery Manager (SDM) ensures end-to-end service quality, client satisfaction, and contractual compliance, acting as the primary liaison between customers and internal technical teams.
	Key responsibilities includeoverseeing operations, managing service-level agreements (SLAs) and KPIs, resolving escalations, and driving continuous improvement to enhance service delivery efficiency.


Core Roles and Responsibilities


	Client Relationship Management: Acting as the main point of contact, ensuring client needs are met, and managing expectations to foster long-term partnerships
	Service Delivery Optimization: Overseeing day-to-day operations to ensure services are delivered on time, within budget, and to quality standards
	SLA and KPI Management: Defining, monitoring, and reporting on key performance indicators and service-level agreements to ensure contractual compliance
	Escalation Management: Taking ownership of service-related issues, ensuring timely resolution to minimize operational impact.
	Process Improvement: Utilizing feedback, data analytics, and industry best practices to streamline processes, increase efficiency, and enhance value
	Team Leadership: Mentoring and collaborating with cross-functional teams to align with company goals and project requirements
	Reporting: Presenting regular performance reports to both senior management and clients to highlight achievements and address gap


Key Skills Required:


	Strong Leadership: Ability to motivate teams and drive project success
	Communication: Excellent verbal and written skills for client-facing and internal communications.
	Problem-Solving: Strong critical thinking to manage complex escalations and risks.
	Technical Proficiency: Understanding of IT systems, service management tools, and project management methodologies


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp; recruitment@cobranet.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Service Delivery Manager Job at Cobranet Limited




        
    

        
        Cobranet Limited; a reputable organization incorporated in 2003 and provides internet solutions. Our footprint and range of products have grown immensely since incorporation and we are proud to provide every segment of society with a reliable link to the digital universe.

Our entire network topology is rugged, dynamic and fully redundant with negligible downtimes: content showing extremely high availability exceeding 99.5%. Our promise is to continue providing innovative solutions at the best feature-to-price and service-to-price ratio.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Service Delivery Manager
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Summary


	A Service Delivery Manager (SDM) ensures end-to-end service quality, client satisfaction, and contractual compliance, acting as the primary liaison between customers and internal technical teams.
	Key responsibilities includeoverseeing operations, managing service-level agreements (SLAs) and KPIs, resolving escalations, and driving continuous improvement to enhance service delivery efficiency.


Core Roles and Responsibilities


	Client Relationship Management: Acting as the main point of contact, ensuring client needs are met, and managing expectations to foster long-term partnerships
	Service Delivery Optimization: Overseeing day-to-day operations to ensure services are delivered on time, within budget, and to quality standards
	SLA and KPI Management: Defining, monitoring, and reporting on key performance indicators and service-level agreements to ensure contractual compliance
	Escalation Management: Taking ownership of service-related issues, ensuring timely resolution to minimize operational impact.
	Process Improvement: Utilizing feedback, data analytics, and industry best practices to streamline processes, increase efficiency, and enhance value
	Team Leadership: Mentoring and collaborating with cross-functional teams to align with company goals and project requirements
	Reporting: Presenting regular performance reports to both senior management and clients to highlight achievements and address gap


Key Skills Required:


	Strong Leadership: Ability to motivate teams and drive project success
	Communication: Excellent verbal and written skills for client-facing and internal communications.
	Problem-Solving: Strong critical thinking to manage complex escalations and risks.
	Technical Proficiency: Understanding of IT systems, service management tools, and project management methodologies


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:  [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Ony Qualified candidates will be considered.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Detailing Engineer (OFWL)",
  "description": "African Steel Mills Nigeria Limited is a leading Manufacturer and Supplier of Steel Products, including Steel Bars.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Summary


	The Detailing Engineer will be responsible for preparing accurate and detailed technical drawings for fabrication and construction purposes. The role involves translating engineering designs into shop drawings, ensuring precision, compliance with standards, and seamless coordination with production teams.


Key Responsibilities


	Prepare detailed fabrication/shop drawings from design and engineering inputs
	Interpret structural and mechanical drawings, specifications, and client requirements
	Develop cutting lists, material take-offs, and bills of materials (BOM)
	Ensure drawings meet fabrication standards and are production-ready
	Coordinate with production, project, and design teams to resolve technical issues
	Revise drawings based on feedback, site conditions, and project changes


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree or HND in Mechanical Engineering, Civil/Structural Engineering, or related field
	2&ndash;5 years of experience in detailing within a fabrication or construction environment.
